title: Project Life on Two Peas
excerpt: There are so many new products that are now available at Two Peas in A Bucket . I chose to showcase 3 new collections for this week's Project Life video. Since I have found a nice rhythm and routine for…
body: There are so many new products that are now available at Two Peas in A Bucket. I chose to showcase 3 new collections for this week's Project Life video. Since I have found a nice rhythm and routine for what works to getting the spreads done, there aren't really too many mind-blowing techniques shown. New products and a couple tricks here and there to make it work, but really it's about enjoying the process and getting the weeks recorded. Still love incorporating the memorabilia throughout the week. These bows by Maggie Holmes and Crate Paper are even more fantastic in person than in the photo. And although the We R Memory Keepers 3x4 punch is out of stock, you can hit the "Request & Notify Me" button if you're interested in it as soon as it comes back. I really do love using it. For this spread I mixed the page protector styles with Design A on the left side and Design B on the right.
